covered_conduct: false claims to the United States and certain reverse false claims
award_trigger: successful action or settlement of the claim
award_range: 15 to 25 percent if government proceeds; 25 to 30 percent if government declines
filing_or_claim_path: file sealed qui tam complaint and disclosure statement through counsel
disclosure_timing_issue: seal and government-intervention timing are litigation issues
diligence_use: identify whether national-security diligence facts are really government-payment facts
escalation_note: Escalate to FCA counsel before any relator filing or disclosure strategy.

award_trigger: SEC enforcement action with more than 1000000 dollars in sanctions ordered
filing_or_claim_path: submit tip and later award application through SEC process
diligence_use: identify when issuer or securities-market facts move out of DOJ pilot and into SEC lane
escalation_note: Escalate to securities counsel before routing.

award_trigger: CFTC covered action or related action with more than 1000000 dollars in sanctions
award_range: 10 to 30 percent of monetary sanctions collected
filing_or_claim_path: submit Form TCR and later award claim
diligence_use: identify commodities derivatives swaps or market-manipulation lane
escalation_note: Escalate to CFTC counsel before routing.

covered_conduct: BSA IEEPA TWEA Kingpin Act and covered conspiracies
award_trigger: covered Treasury or DOJ action or related action with more than 1000000 dollars in monetary sanctions
award_range: 10 to 30 percent of collected monetary sanctions; excludes forfeiture restitution and victim compensation
filing_or_claim_path: FinCEN process pending final rule; tips currently accepted
disclosure_timing_issue: proposed rule includes timing and application mechanics; final rule pending
diligence_use: identify BSA sanctions outbound data-security or IEEPA-linked facts in diligence
escalation_note: Escalate to AML or sanctions counsel because implementing rule status is still moving.

program_name: DOJ Corporate Whistleblower Awards Pilot Program
covered_conduct: corporate crime in listed pilot areas including sanctions material support terrorism trade customs procurement and other corporate offenses
award_trigger: successful civil or criminal forfeiture exceeding 1000000 dollars in net proceeds
award_range: up to 30 percent of first 100 million dollars in net proceeds forfeited and up to 5 percent of next 100 million to 500 million dollars
filing_or_claim_path: submit DOJ intake and later claim when notice posts
disclosure_timing_issue: whistleblower and company each have 120-day timing issues for internal reports
diligence_use: identify when facts fall through FCA SEC CFTC or FinCEN gaps but may lead to forfeiture
escalation_note: Escalate to white-collar counsel before any submission or company self-disclosure decision. Track the 120-day timing issue.
